title: In-app update prompt (portable, GitHub latest)
description: On startup (PORTABLE builds only) fetch GitHub releases/latest, compareSemVer vs APP_VERSION; if newer show an MpiOkCancel popup. OK = quit app + run the existing update.bat/.sh/.command (downloads+applies+relaunches). Cancel 3x on a version mutes it until a newer one lands. Reuses existing update scripts, compareSemVer, MpiOkCancel, resolveMainPortableRoot (portable gate). New: 2 IPC handlers (check-for-update, run-update), updateChecker.js renderer glue, UPDATE_DISMISSED storage key, init.js boot call. quit+spawn path is build-verify only.
